findings.authority_quote: The evacuation begins at 06:40 on 14 October 2147.
findings.audited_quote: At 06:15, the evacuation was already underway

findings.authority_quote: Mara cannot bear weight on her left ankle until the medical seal is removed.
findings.audited_quote: putting her full weight on her left ankle

findings.authority_quote: The brass key remains sealed inside Locker 12; no character has access to it.
findings.audited_quote: Mara pulled the brass key from her pocket

findings.authority_quote: Ivo has never met Captain Soren before the docking hearing.
findings.audited_quote: Ivo gave him their old three-tap handshake

findings.authority_quote: The north bridge is closed after the glass collapse and cannot be crossed.
findings.audited_quote: Mara sprinted across the north bridge
